author: rotifer-alpha
description: Active position monitoring: fetches live prices from Polymarket, then applies take-profit, trailing stop, and probability reversal detection.

funds.description: Array of FundConfig objects defining per-fund risk parameters

actions.description: Monitor-triggered close actions for positions breaching take-profit or stop conditions

highWaterMarkUpdates.description: Updated high water marks for open positions with new price highs

dependencies.description: Polymarket Gamma API for live position prices (via price.ts fetchPrices)

transparency.note: Monitoring logic (take-profit/stop thresholds) is deterministic; price fetching introduces external non-determinism.
